---
name: Correction
about: Report a factual error, broken code, or misleading explanation
title: "[CORRECTION] Module X.Y — short description of the error"
labels: correction
assignees: ''
---

## What is wrong?

<!-- Be specific. Quote the text or describe the code that's incorrect. -->

**Module:** <!-- e.g. 1.1 — What is an LLM? -->
**Layer:** <!-- Layer 1 / Layer 2 / Layer 3 -->
**Location:** <!-- Section heading or line number if you know it -->

## What is the correct information?

<!-- Provide the accurate fact, working code, or clearer explanation. -->

## Source / evidence

<!-- Link to a primary source (official docs, paper, RFC) that supports the correction.
     Unsourced corrections may take longer to review. -->

- Source:
- Date:

## Impact

<!-- How misleading or harmful is the current version?
     e.g. "A reader following this code will get a runtime error" vs "Minor wording issue" -->
